title: Review Thinking Process Before Approval

findings.description: No thinking block visibility controls found in the chat interface. No toggle or expandable section for reviewing the model's thinking process before approving actions.
findings.expected: A control to show/hide the model's internal thinking process, allowing review before approval.
findings.actual: No thinking toggle or expandable thinking blocks visible in new chat view or settings.
findings.blocked_by: Requires active conversation to fully verify; blocked by known crash bug

verdict: Feature not implemented. No thinking process visibility controls found.
